name: rephraser-proxy
description: Secure proxy server for the Rephraser desktop app — routes AI requests through a server-side API key

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Your OpenAI API key (starts with sk-)

MAX_REQUESTS_PER_WINDOW.description: Max requests per IP per rate limit window

ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (blank = allow all)

REDIS_URL.description: Redis URL for distributed rate limiting (optional — falls back to in-memory)
